x_search_trump_iran.author: @ConciousLabRat
x_search_trump_iran.content: Markets open → Trump floods feed with 'potential deal' headlines. Markets close → threats of bombing Iran 'back to the stone age' or hitting power plants if Strait of Hormuz stays shut. This seesaw has dragged on for over a month.

x_search_trump_iran.author: @madlife1000
x_search_trump_iran.content: Trump is the one begging for a deal. Iran said no deal.

x_search_trump_iran.author: @astronglady
x_search_trump_iran.content: I can't see why Iran would negotiate when Trump shows them no respect. What would make them think a compulsive lying narcissist would respect any deal?

x_search_trump_iran.author: @EzemFrancis
x_search_trump_iran.content: Iran says intelligence chief killed by US-Israeli strike, as Trump threatens 'hell' if deal not made (from businessandtransport.com)

x_search_trump_iran.author: @KurdishDoctrine
x_search_trump_iran.content: Trump is playing a high-stakes game of 'coercive diplomacy.' By floating the idea of arming ethnic minorities, he's trying to scare Iran into a compromise. He's using the Kurdish 'bogeyman' as a bargaining chip for a deal he desperately wants to sign.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @shedblood178
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iran mediators 'reject temporary ceasefire' after receiving new plan to end war (from independent.co.uk)

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @Owaye_T
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iran should ask for a ceasefire, so you say, how did this war start, which American soldier or citizen was hurt for America to attack Iran?

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @A_K_Mandhan
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: BREAKING: While Pakistan was presenting its ceasefire proposal to Tehran, Israel was carrying out targeted strikes on key Iranian figures. Both happened overnight, between April 5 and April 6. The Islamabad proposal.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @mvwillo1610
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iran will not agree to a temporary ceasefire, they need a permanent solution to US imperialism and destabilisation in their region.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @Happyfeet23443
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Bomb Iran Saturday always turns into Ceasefire Monday? Every weekend is the same thing. 1 like, 9 views

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @RuDauntless
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iranian officials made clear to mediators they don't want to be caught in a Gaza or Lebanon situation where there is a ceasefire on paper, but the US and Israel can attack again whenever they want to.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: Oil prices are now crossing above $115/barrel in the US. As a result, our models indicate that if current levels are sustained another ~7 weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7%. This would put US inflation at its highest level since September 2023.
